author: nero_eth
content:
Yeah, that one one of the big focuses at interop. For most clients, comapring full BAL with "no reads", the gains we saw were quite significant (up to 1.5-2x on avg).
Also, if we go for splitting the BAL from the ExecutionPayloadEnvelope in hegota and make it travel the wire independently, then builders can publish it even earlier (nothing signed inside the BAL that could be an unbundling risk) and clients can start prefetching (+ post-state root) calculation even before the payload arrived.

author: jwasinger
content: okay, so only geth is an outlier, in that we haven't found the reads to lend a performance gain yet
